recommendations.title: Avenue Montaigne
recommendations.overview: A young woman arrives in Paris where she finds a job as a waitress in bar next on Avenue Montaigne that caters to the surrounding theaters and the wealthy inhabitants of the area. She will meet a pianist, a famous actress and a great art collector, a

recommendations.title: Jet Lag
recommendations.overview: At Charles de Gaulle Airport in Paris, a beautician on her way to a new job in Mexico accidentally meets a cook who is on his way back from America. Labor strikes, bad weather, and pure luck cause the two of them to share a room overnight at the airp

recommendations.title: Cezanne and I
recommendations.overview: They loved each other with the ardor of thirteen-year-old boys. Rebellion and curiosity, hopes and doubts, girls and dreams of glory – they shared it all. Paul was rich, Emile poor. They went skinny-dipping, drank absinthe, starved, only to overeat.

recommendations.title: Rope
recommendations.overview: Two young men attempt to prove they committed the perfect murder by hosting a dinner party for the family of a classmate they just strangled to death.

recommendations.title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
recommendations.overview: A quirky, dysfunctional family's road trip is upended when they find themselves in the middle of the robot apocalypse and suddenly become humanity's unlikeliest last hope.

recommendations.title: The Exterminating Angel
recommendations.overview: After a lavish dinner party, the guests find themselves unable to depart... and, over the next few days, all of their elaborate societal pretenses and façades deteriorate as they are reduced to living like animals.

recommendations.title: Lord, Give Me Patience
recommendations.overview: An ultraconservative family father must spend a weekend with his dysfunctional children for the burial of his wife.

recommendations.title: Dinner for One
recommendations.overview: A very old woman wants to have dinner with her friends. As they are all dead, the butler has to play the role of every guest.

recommendations.title: To Be or Not to Be
recommendations.overview: During the Nazi occupation of Poland, an acting troupe becomes embroiled in a Polish soldier's efforts to track down a German spy.

recommendations.title: The People We Hate at the Wedding
recommendations.overview: A dysfunctional family that can't seem to get along and get it together reluctantly reunites for a family wedding. As their many skeletons are wrenched from the closet, it turns out to be just what this singular family needs to reconnect.
